title: Supreme Court rejects Trump bid to appeal E. Jean Carroll $5 million verdict
summary_full: E. Jean Carroll has said since 2019 that President Donald Trump sexually assaulted her in a New York department store dressing room in the mid-1990s.
summary_public: E. Jean Carroll has said since 2019 that President Donald Trump sexually assaulted her in a New York department store dressing room in the mid-1990s.
